# BugBaas 2.4.8

![BugBaas 2.4 update](https://github.com/thomascimpro/cimpro-bugbaas/releases/download/v2.4.8/bugbaas-2.4.0-release-card.png)

## 2.4.8 hotfix
- Foreground bug rewards fixed.
- Tapping a foreground bug now keeps granting BugDex inventory, including duplicate bugs.
- XP/splat write failures no longer block the BugDex reward popup.
- Point updates no longer write unrelated duel rating defaults into the user document.

## Installatie
- Package blijft `nl.cimpro.bugbaas`.
- APK blijft legacy/debug signed voor compatibiliteit met bestaande 1.x/2.x installs.
